'''鈭歴h-r-y-b''' ('''kasharyeboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:molrow|molrow]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-r-y-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:molrow|molrow]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-r-y-b
|-
! Lemma
| kasharyeboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisharyeboko|thisharyeboko]] || [[word:jisharyeboko|jisharyeboko]] || [[word:shisharyeboko|shisharyeboko]] || [[word:kisharyeboko|kisharyeboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusharyeboko|thuthusharyeboko]] || [[word:jujusharyeboko|jujusharyeboko]] || [[word:shushusharyeboko|shushusharyeboko]] || [[word:kukusharyeboko|kukusharyeboko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosharyeboko|thosharyeboko]] || [[word:josharyeboko|josharyeboko]] || [[word:shosharyeboko|shosharyeboko]] || [[word:kosharyeboko|kosharyeboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙sharyeboko|th忙sharyeboko]] || [[word:j忙sharyeboko|j忙sharyeboko]] || [[word:sh忙sharyeboko|sh忙sharyeboko]] || [[word:k忙sharyeboko|k忙sharyeboko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasharyeboko|thasharyeboko]] || [[word:jasharyeboko|jasharyeboko]] || [[word:shasharyeboko|shasharyeboko]] || [[word:kasharyeboko|kasharyeboko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
